strings.settings.title: Na Vakarau
strings.settings.subtitle: Na Vakarau ni Ilakolako
strings.lang.title: Na Vosa
strings.lang.intro: E donu tu na vosa bibi. Kauta yani na nomuni vosa ena vakadewataki vaka-taucoko e sega ni vakabauta na initaneti — na itukutuku, na itukutuku ni gunu yaloyalo kei na isi tale.
strings.lang.failed: E sega ni caka vinaka na kauta yani. Tarogi na veivakatorocaketaki, ka sega ni dua e caka.
strings.settings.units.desc: E vaka cava e vakatokai na veikatubulabula.
strings.settings.night.desc: Na damudamu qase e taqomaka na mata e sautu tu ena loaloa — na livaliva damudamu e sega ni cauca levu na raici ni bogi.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: E damudamu vaka-otometi ni loaloa na lomalagi ni liu ni siga.
strings.settings.location.desc: O cei na tuba e vakayacori kina na lomalagi.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Wilika kaukauwa na gauna kei na vakaravi — ena ilakolako e sega ni liga kei ira era sega ni raica.
strings.settings.fov: Na Itabakidua ni Raici ni Kamera
strings.settings.fov.desc: Vakarautaki vakaitiiti iko ena donu na livaliva ni matanitu kalokalo kei na gaunisala ni satalaiti ena lomalagi dina.
strings.settings.about.credits: E cakava vaka astronomy-engine, satellite.js & Celestrak.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.pro.free: Na Verioni E Sega ni Totonaki
strings.pro.codePlaceholder: E tiko na icode ni dolava?
strings.pro.badCode: E sega ni caka vinaka na icode oqo.
strings.paywall.title: Dolava na Lomalagi Taucoko
strings.paywall.subtitle: E dua na veivakatorocaketaki. E sega ni totonaki ni vula, e sega ni ivakatukutuku — nomi iko taucoko, taucoko e sega ni initaneti.
strings.paywall.feature.catalog: Na kalokalo, matanitu kei na satalaiti taucoko
strings.paywall.feature.favorites: Na ka e vinaka sega ni vakaiqali
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Na Misini ni Gauna — raica na lomalagi ena dua na siga
strings.paywall.feature.events: Na ka e yaco ena lomalagi — eclipse, ua ni kalokalo, ko ira e duavata
strings.paywall.feature.night: Raici ni bogi taucoko (samasama, otometi, kaukauwa)
strings.paywall.feature.languages: Kauta yani na vosa e dua tale
strings.paywall.codePrompt: E tiko na icode ni dolava?
strings.paywall.comingSoon: E na dolava na veivakatorocaketaki tikoga — vakayagataki na icode ni dolava oqo.
strings.paywall.error: E tiko na ka ca. Taumada tale.
strings.paywall.restoreNone: E sega ni raici na veivakatorocaketaki makawa.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Digitaki na ilakolako ena raica ena lomalagi
strings.stars.title: Na Kalokalo
strings.stars.subtitle: Na kalokalo e vakaigadrevi {n} e sega ni igadrevi
strings.deepsky.title: Na Lomalagi Qase
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Kalokalo {n}, nebula, na kalaxi kei na kulubu
strings.constellations.title: Na Matanitu Kalokalo
strings.constellations.subtitle: {n} na iyataivata kalokalo e vakadinadina
strings.satellites.title: Na Satalaiti
strings.events.title: Na Ka e Yaco ena Lomalagi
strings.events.subtitle: Na ka e yaco mai — Dokata ena gauna volitaki
strings.events.calculating: E vakayacori tiko na ka e yaco mai…
strings.search.name: Vakarorogo vaka igoa…
strings.list.gettingLocation: E kacivaka tiko na nomuni tuba…
strings.list.locationUnavailable: E sega ni rawa na tuba
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: E sega ni ka e vinaka — Dolava na ka, ka dokata ★ me cakava.
strings.list.empty.visible: E sega ni dua e cake ni horizon oqo — Taumada "Vakaraitaka taucoko".
strings.list.empty.search: E sega ni ka e dodonu ki na nomuni vakarorogo.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: E sega ni kalokalo e tiko ena lisi e cake ni horizon oqo.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: E sega ni ka ni lomalagi qase e cake ni horizon oqo.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: E sega ni dua na matanitu kalokalo oqo e cake ni horizon oqo.
strings.sat.overheadDay: E tiko cake oqo ia e siga
strings.sat.overheadShadow: E tiko cake oqo ia e loaloa ena Vuravura
strings.sat.noPass: E sega ni raici e loma ni gauna vou
strings.sat.loading: E foaki tale na ivolatalatala ni orbit…
strings.sat.bundled: Na Ivolatalatala ni Orbit Donu Tu
strings.fav.empty:
E sega ni ka e vinaka.
Dolava na planiti se kalokalo, ka dokata ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: E sega ni dua na ka e vinaka e cake ni horizon oqo.
strings.fav.noMatch: E sega ni ka e vinaka e dodonu ki na nomuni vakarorogo.
strings.point.belowBanner: {name} e ra ni horizon — Tovolea e ra ni Vuravura.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} e sega ni tiko cake oqo — Dokata ivolatalatala ena gauna e mai mai.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ Na Voli ni Gauna: {when} — Dokata me lesu ki oqo
strings.point.permBody: Na Planet Pointer e vakaraitaka na ipikeli ena loma ni vitio kamera dina me vakatokai {name}.
strings.info.favorited: ★  E loma ni ka e vinaka
strings.info.passNote: Gauna ni yasana. Na isemati e cake =livaliva, na gauna e rawarawa.
strings.ev.lunarSub: Na Mataca e yaloka mai ena loaloa ni Vuravura
strings.ev.solarSub: Na Mataca e yaloka mai dua ena Siga
strings.time.title: Na Misini ni Gauna
strings.time.subtitle: Raica na lomalagi ena dua na siga se gauna.
